programme.title: Toxic Redemption-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Four men seek to redeem past failures on a forgotten lake deep in the Philippine jungle. S18 E08.

programme.title: No Legs, No Problem-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A woman who is a double amputee and her ex-military partner take on the Belizean jungle. S18 E01.

programme.title: Ecuador-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls survives in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges and eating plants. S01 E14.

programme.title: Mexico-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Mexico's Copper Canyon. S01 E12.

programme.title: Desperate Cry for Help-Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker hurries to fix a burst dam and keep the big Dominion Creek gold weighs going. S14 E14.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Cañón de Chicamocha-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: Fernanda and Palma start their mission trapped in the dark caverns in Chicamocha Canyon.

programme.title: Kimberley, Australia-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls survives in the Australian outback by avoiding sun stroke and deadly crocodiles. S01 E13.

programme.title: Up With the Gods: Himalayan Tahr-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E03.

programme.title: Outback Odyssey-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S01 E04.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Getting Close to Black Death-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: In the wilderness of Northern South Africa, Mario tries to harvest the Cape buffalo. S02 E06.

programme.title: Ecuador-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Grylls survives in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges and eating plants. S01 E14.

programme.title: Baja Guajira-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: The duo put their skills to the test in the driest area in Colombia. S01 E06.

programme.title: Shaolin-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed travels to a Buddhist monastery to master kung fu and control his internal energy. S01 E06.

programme.title: Norway: Edge of Survival-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls attempts to survive the conditions in Norway while equipped with the latest technology. S06 E03.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: Dawid hitchhikes to Kochi from Bengaluru and later, learns how anglers make a living.

programme.title: Boars and Prehistoric Fish-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario returns to his Australia to assist a friend and to catch some prehistoric fish. S01 E07.

programme.title: Selva de Ñambí-Dual Survival Mexico
programme.desc: Fernanda and Palma must navigate fatal landslides and extreme humidity in Colombian woods. S01 E03.

programme.title: Jungle-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: In the lethal jungle of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges. S02 E04.

programme.title: Erongo Mountains-Marooned With Ed Stafford
programme.desc: Can Ed Stafford survive hundreds of kilometres of scorching, rocky desert?. S04 E03.

programme.title: Iceland: Fire and Ice-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls is dropped on an ice cap covering an active volcano during a blizzard. S07 E03.

programme.title: Man, Woman, Wild
programme.desc: The couple faces a perilous situation when a forest fire burns their camp down.

programme.title: Thieves in the Night-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: A fashion producer and a paramedic face Mexico's hostile Mayan jungle. S09 E06.

programme.title: Burnt to a Crisp-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Lee and LeAnn head to Indio Maíz after a deadly hurricane hits Nicaragua. S09 E08.

programme.title: Forbidden Fruit-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Gary and Karra's skills are put to the test when one of them consumes an unripe fruit. S09 E04.
